comment: Initially the communication was non existent. Not the kind of service I was expecting.

I want to give Yolande and her team a huge shout out. They collected my vehicle from my home and went the extra mile to assist. Having a relative unknown vehicle a Landwind it was a challenge at best. But they did not stop to try and assist the best they could. They will be my go to shop and I will highly recommend them.

I just want to say thank you to Yolande at Silverton. They helped me get my Ranger back on the road in no time. Did what no other company could under my warranty. I am so grateful for their help and assistance. Could not have asked for better service!!!
